summary: Iteration 6 testing complete: All 3 new modifications verified - (1) Timezone field in site settings, (2) Auto-start logic with /auto-start-check and /auto-start endpoints, (3) Line IDs hidden on all screens

minor.issue: XDD line missing auto_start_at_day_begin field (created before feature was added). Field defaults to false on read but should be migrated to database.

passed_tests: Backend: API root and server-time endpoints working
Backend: Site creation with timezone field (Europe/Paris default)
Backend: Site update with different timezone
Backend: GET /api/lines/{line_id}/auto-start-check returns should_auto_start, expected_takt, elapsed_in_current_takt_minutes
Backend: POST /api/lines/{line_id}/auto-start triggers auto-start with correct takt number
Frontend: Dashboard loads, line IDs not visible in UI text
Frontend: TRADY 4 (auto-start=true) shows Suspendre button, not Démarrer
Frontend: URL copy button exists (replaced screen management)
Frontend: Site cards display timezone with globe icon
Frontend: Site form has 'Fuseau horaire' field with 15 timezone options
Frontend: TV Display shows line name without ID
Frontend: TV Display shows working hours from shift_organization.teams (12:56-16:00)
Frontend: TV Display shows only Pause/Resume for auto-start line (no Démarrer)
critical_code_review_comments: Consider database migration to add auto_start_at_day_begin=false to existing lines for consistency
seed_data_creation: Used existing lines: TRADY 4 (id: aba1336d-f810-4e7b-872c-b59efae4c132, auto_start=true, 12:56-16:00) and XDD (id: dd3fed61-d14a-4209-a5e0-7e6fe1beb683, auto_start=false)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration 6 modifications verified: timezone in site settings (Europe/Paris default), auto-start logic endpoints working correctly, line IDs hidden from Dashboard and TV Display. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6.py covers site timezone CRUD and auto-start endpoints. TRADY 4 is currently running with auto-start enabled and Test team schedule 12:56-16:00.
